item.title: Kramer XB 20 1980 circa - Dark Brown — $1,132.86
item.description:
$1,132.86 · Good · Ferranti Musica

Come da titolo, strumento perfettamente funzionante, tutto originale

item.title: Silvertone 1490 Late 60's - Sunburst — $250
item.description:
$250 · Non Functioning · Dano's Gear Outlet

Silvertone bass probably late 60's. PROJECT. Will need to be set up and nut recut. May need a lite fret level. Pickguard was repaired at some point, see photos. Both pickups work fine. Probably worth more in parts but im hoping someone will rescue this and keep it intact. No case or gigbag. Make me an offer!

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller Z3 V 2025 - Present - Alpine White — $475
item.description:
$475 · Excellent · Guitar Gear

5 string right handed Sire Z3 bass guitar. A few months old and barely played. Love the sound, love the bass, but I have other basses that I play more

item.title: Warwick GPS Thumb 4 Bolt-On 2017 - Nirvana Black — $2,198.57
item.description:
$2,198.57 · Excellent · Bass Direct

The Thumb bass is a core part of Warwick’s line-up. With renowned players such as Dirk Lance (Incubus) and Ryan Martinie (Mudvayne) using them, you know they’re incredibly good instruments.

The Thumb models are equipped with active MEC J-Style pickups, providing that unique Warwick tone that has been heard on countless records. They deliver plenty of punch and clarity, ensuring that you will cut through onstage or when laying down tracks in the studio. Active 2-Band electronics give you great control over your sound, making this a very versatile bass that can be used for a variety of styles.

These German-made basses are constructed using high-quality machinery, combined with the expertise of their vastly knowledgeable luthiers. Amazing tone woods are used by Warwick, giving you a truly beautiful instrument with an inspiring sound. You’ll never want to put one of their basses down.

The Thumb models feature a smooth and ergonomic body shape, not getting in your way so you can play comfortably for hours. The ovangkol body is joined with a bolt-on ovangkol neck, delivering a snappy attack and giving excellent projection to notes. The Wenge fretboard gives a classy-look to the instrument, and feels great under the fingers.

Warwick basses have been crafted in Germany since 1982, and are renowned for their incredible quality and sounds. Joined with the Framus brand, Warwick are established as a company that offer high-spec basses, produced using only the best manufacturing equipment with the experienced skills of their respected luthiers.

With several different bass lines on offer, you can be sure to find the perfect bass to meet your performance needs. Their construction offers brilliant playability, with tonewoods and electronics that provide amazing tones and versatility for any style of music.


This bass is presented in fantastic condition and comes with a generic hardcase.


  • Serial Number: GPS M 005217-17
  • Origin: Germany
  • Year: 2017
  • Body Material: Ovangkol
  • Colour: Nirvana black
  • Finish: Satin
  • Neck Finish: Satin
  • Neck Material: Ovangkol
  • Fingerboard: Wenge
  • Inlays: Side dots
  • Pickups: MEC
  • Electronics: MEC
  • Controls: Volume, pickup pan, bass/treble
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Gig Bag/Case: Hardcase
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 24
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Nut Width: 38.5mm
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Weight: 4.0kg/8lbs15oz

item.title: Takamine GB30CE-BLK G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Black Finish B-Stock — $639.20
item.description:
$639.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Takamine GB30CE-BLK G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Black Finish

The GB30CE-BLK is a professional-grade acoustic-electric bass that balances playability with tonal sophistication. Its Jumbo Cutaway body delivers commanding low-end presence while the Venetian-style cutaway provides comfortable upper-fret access. This is a serious instrument built to perform consistently in studio sessions, live settings, and practice environments alike.

Construction & Playability

Built with a solid Spruce top paired with Mahogany back and sides, this bass produces a warm, balanced tone with natural sustain. The Mahogany neck with Laurel fingerboard offers excellent durability and a smooth playing surface, while the Dovetail neck joint ensures stability and resonance transfer. At 864mm scale length with a 1.77" nut width, the instrument maintains proper string spacing for precise intonation and comfortable fingering technique across the fretboard.

Electronics & Amplification

The integrated Takamine TK-40B preamp provides comprehensive tone-shaping capabilities with a built-in tuner, three-band EQ, gain controls, mid-shift control, and bass-boost switch—giving you studio-grade control in any setting. The EQ bypass function lets you switch between processed and unprocessed tones instantly, while Synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle preserve acoustic resonance and clarity through the amplification chain.

Key Features
  • Jumbo Cutaway body with Venetian-style cutaway for upper-fret access
  • Solid Spruce top with Mahogany back and sides
  • Mahogany neck with Dovetail joint construction
  • Laurel fingerboard with Synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle
  • 864mm scale length with 1.77" nut width
  • 4-String configuration
  • Takamine TK-40B preamp with built-in tuner and three-band EQ
  • Mid-shift control, gain controls, bass-boost switch, and EQ bypass
  • Chrome die-cast tuners
  • Gloss finish in Black
  • Dimensions: 1214.7mm length × 435mm width × 125mm depth

The GB30CE-BLK represents exceptional value for bassists seeking premium Takamine craftsmanship at a used-market price point.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of open-box or display inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass guitar. Acquire this premium Takamine acoustic-electric bass at a significant B-Stock discount while maintaining complete peace of mind with the full manufacturer warranty.

item.title: Vintage ('ca '83) Squier SQ Series Precision Bass with Hardshell Case MIJ Japan — $699.99
item.description:
$699.99 · Very Good · The Fret Shop, Huntsville AL

This is a very nice Japanese Squier SQ Series Precision Bass from the early '80s. Bass is setup very nicely and sounds incredible. Metal shows a little tarnishing but the finish is in great shape. Includes period correct hardshell case.

item.title: Used (2012) Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special Electric Bass Guitar — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Very Good · The Fret Shop, Huntsville AL

This is a 2012 Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass in very good condition. There is one scratch on the back between the neckplate and battery compartment (see pics) but, otherwise, the bass is in excellent condition. Setup nicely and plays great.

item.title: Spector EuroBolt 5 2025 - Inferno Red Gloss — $1,548.07
item.description:
$1,548.07 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Spector’s iconic silhouette takes on a new life with a range of updated models for 2019, including the new EuroBolt Series featuring roasted maple bolt-on necks. These new bolt-on models feature premium, proven tonewoods, including highly figured North American maple, European alder, and roasted maple. EuroBolt models also feature professional grade Aguilar pickups & preamps.

The all-new EuroBolt Series takes the classic Spector design and substitutes a bolt-on neck, roasted maple neck & fingerboard, and premium pickups and pre-amps from Aguilar Electronics. Crafted from premium tonewoods including American figured maple and European alder, these meticulously crafted basses feature Spector’s original deep inset neck pocket design, which provides added sustain and rigidity, professional grade Spector hardware, and a high-gloss finish.

This bass is presented in fantastic condition and comes with a fresh setup by us in our workshop.


  • Serial Number: NB18093
  • Origin: Czech Republic
  • Year: 2025
  • Body Material: Alder, poplar burl
  • Colour: Inferno red
  • Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Finish: Satin
  • Neck Material: Roasted maple
  • Fingerboard: Roasted maple
  • Inlays: Crowns, side dots
  • Pickups: aguilar
  • Electronics: Aguilar
  • Controls: Volume, volume, bass, treble
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Black
  • Gig Bag/Case: N/A
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 24
  • String Spacing: 16.5mm
  • Nut Width: 45mm
  • Scale Length: 35”
  • Weight: 3.8kg/8lbs10oz

item.description:
$3,894.61 · Excellent · BassBros

This Fender Custom Shop '60 Jazz Bass NOS is a beauty! A fantastic example in excellent condition with some small marks around bridge from cover. This one is a great weight at 8lb 14oz / 4.0kg. We have fully checked over the bass and everything, including the trussrod and electronics, works perfectly. The original hardcase and certificate is included.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

item.title: Spector Euro 4 LX Doug Wimbish 2021 - Bahama Blue — $2,722.04
item.description:
$2,722.04 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Now here is a beautiful bass from Spector!

This 2021 Doug Wimbish Limited Edition is finished in the stunning Bahama Blue and is immaculate!

EMG pickups on board for that signature tone we all know and love.

Gig bag included, and freshly setup in our workshop here at Bass Direct with new La Bella roundwound strings… Whats not to love?

item.title: Fender Telecaster Bass 1974 - Blonde — $4,411.10
item.description:
$4,411.10 · Very Good · BassBros

This beautiful 1974 Telecaster bass sounds exactly like it should. Fat, massive tones that will sit under any mix! The bass features original pots, date only visible on one dating to 1973 and the pickup dating to 1974. There are lots of signs of wear and mojo throughout the instrument, most noticeably on the bottom of the instrument and on the top horn and where a cover has been on the bridge. Everything works as it should including trussrod, electronics. A hardcase is included.

- Part exchange welcome -

Serial Number - 401640
Year - 1974
Colour - Blonde
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Maple
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 11lbs/5kgs
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender Bass Humbucker
Gigbag/Hardcase - Hardcase

item.description:

item.title: Gotoh GB 707 GG ( right ) 2 x tuners Gold — $47.70
item.description:
$47.70 · Excellent · Vintage Spirit

New

The Gotoh GB707 bass tuners feature a 1:20 gear ratio for tuning up quickly and accurately. The 'Rock-Solid' string post improves the tuning stability of the tuner and stays strong during bending, special elastic parts eliminate any rattle in the post and transmission of string vibration to the instrument is maximised. The tuners are completely sealed and permanently lubricated through Gotoh's 'Lubri-Coat' technology, a coating applied to the worm gear to ensure better contact between the worm and spur gear wheel, backlash is minimised and durability is increased.

item.title: Spector Euro 4 Limited Edition Ian Hill 2024 - White Gloss — $2,343.75
item.description:
$2,343.75 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Ian Hill has been holding down the low-end for the legendary Judas Priest for 50 years. To celebrate 50 years of uncompromising metal anthems, Ian’s signature bass now features updated specifications. His name is synonymous with classic heavy metal and his signature Spector is carefully crafted to provide his legendary tone to all bassists. The Euro4 Ian Hill is reminiscent of an 80’s era Spector with solid Maple body wings, a 3-piece maple neck, Rosewood fingerboard with a custom Judas Priest 50th anniversary inlay, premium electronics and gold hardware. When it comes to reproducing the countless classic tones in the Judas Priest catalog, Ian relies on a single EMG P pickups and a proprietary Spector TonePump active tone circuit. Together, this electronics package delivers enough power and versatility to cut through any mix. The Euro4 Ian Hill is the perfect choice for die-hard fans of Judas Priest, or bassists looking for an instrument that will provide both classic and cutting tones.

Presented in immaculate condition, including gig bag.


  • Serial Number: NB18186
  • Origin: Czech Republic
  • Year: 2024
  • Body Material: Maple
  • Colour: White
  • Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Inlays: Judas Preist 50th inlay, side dots
  • Pickups: EMG
  • Electronics: Spector TonePump
  • Controls: Volume, bass, treble
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Gold
  • Gig Bag/Case: Gigbag
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 24
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Nut Width: 1.64″
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Weight: 3.8kg/8lbs10oz

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray SR4 3EQ RN 1993 - Translucent Gold — $2,969.29
item.description:
$2,969.29 · Very Good · Hardline-Music Wuppertal

For sale is a used Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray SR4 2EQ RN - Translucent Gold (1993) in very good condition.


All our guitars are ready to be tested in our store!

We do not sell unopened instruments from the high-bay warehouse!


All guitars are checked upon receipt and before sale/shipping and set up with fresh strings. This means that we can respond to your individual wishes (e.g. string gauge / string action / tuning etc.).


If you have any questions, just send us a short message. We will be happy to send you more pictures on request.

item.title: Ernie Ball Stingray 1990 - Black — $3,458.21
item.description:
$3,458.21 · Very Good · Leo's Boutique

I'm selling a completely original 1990 instrument, with a similar case. The neck is straight, and the truss is in place. I'll post more photos of the instrument over the weekend.

Contact me for the actual shipping cost.

item.title: St George / Teisco Bass Mid to late 60s - Tobacco Burst — $349.99
item.description:
$349.99 · Fair · Groove Express

1960’s St. George / Teisco MIJ Bass in tobacco burst. Full 34” scale bass with single pickup, chrome guard, and original hardware and electronics. Shows wear and age throughout (checking and scuffs). Headstock was repaired at some point and is very stable. Sounds great and plays comfortable.


Does not come with the hard case pictured but will be packed securely

item.title: Fender American Series Jazz Bass Black 2007 Electric Bass — $1,598.33
item.description:
$1,598.33 · Excellent · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have a Fender American Series Jazz Bass in Black Gloss finish. Made in the USA in 2007, this bass consists of an Alder body, a Maple neck, and a 20-fret Maple fingerboard. Other appointments include a 4-Saddle Strings-Thru-Body bridge, Fender Open-Gear Die-Cast tuners, and a set of upgraded American Vintage Jazz Bass single coil pickups. These pickups are wired to a neck volume (S-1 push/push series parallel), bridge volume, and a master tone control.


The Maple neck sits comfortably in the hand, with the ‘C’ profile allowing for comfortable reach in all registers and promoting ergonomic thumb positioning, whilst the Gloss finish is fantastic for smooth, quick transitions up and down the neck. The Maple fingerboard feels pleasant under the fingers, whilst the 9.5” radius and Medium jumbo frets allow for ease of different techniques such as slap bass or chordal playing. The double cutaway and contoured body design allows the player unobstructed access to the entire register, whilst also making longer durations of playing a comfortable experience.


The upgraded Fender American Vintage Jazz Bass pickups deliver classic original-era tone and power, with a hotter output for unmistakable punch and midrange growl. Built with alnico 5 magnets for true vintage tone, the pickups deliver deep, warm and rounded low ends that work well with the clear, precise mids and glistening trebles. There is plenty of grunt on offer, with a fast attack that will keep your playing front and centre. The simplicity of the controls ensure that you can stay focussed on your playing whilst still offering comprehensive control of your tone. The S-1 Series/Parallel switch also offers a good amount of tonal versatility for the player to have in their arsenal. 


Brand- Fender

Model- American Series Jazz Bass

Finish- Black

Year- 2007

Made In- USA

Body- Alder

Neck- Maple

Neck Profile- Modern 'C'

Fingerboard- Maple

Fingerboard Radius- 9.5"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width- 1.5"

Pickups- 2x American Vintage Jazz Bass Single Coils

Controls- Neck Volume (Push/Push S-1 Series/Parallel Switch), Bridge Volume, Master Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1010726220570

Weight: 9.35lbs  

Serial: Z6113298


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall excellent condition, it is difficult to discern any markings to the headstock.

Neck: Overall excellent condition, it is difficult to discern any markings to the neck and fingerboard.

Body: Overall excellent condition, all aspects of the body demonstrate very light scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles, as is common with high gloss finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate minimal signs of use.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (3/16" hex) included.

Hardware: Excellent condition.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.

Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully functional. The pickups have been replaced for an American Vintage Jazz Bass set, originals not included.


Case & Accessories

Fender hard case

The case demonstrates light signs of use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass Maple Fingerboard Olympic White — $1,839.99
item.description:
$1,839.99 · Brand New · 8th Street Music

The American Professional II Jazz Bass draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player. Our popular Slim "C" neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. New V-Mod II Jazz Bass single-coil pickups are more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and clarity the Jazz Bass is known for. The American Pro II Jazz Bass delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

  • Two V-Mod II single-coil Jazz Bass pickups
  • Slim "C"-shaped neck profile with rolled fingerboard edges
  • Bone nut; 20 narrow-tall frets
  • HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain
  • Posiflex™ graphite rods for neck reinforcement
  • Includes Deluxe Molded hardshell case

    MPN: 0193972705

item.title: Westone Thunder II Fretless Bass in Black Finish — $975.75
item.description:
$975.75 · Very Good · CC Music

Pre-owned Westone Thunder II Fretless Bass in Black Finish in good condition with general age related wear and marks as shown.


This bass was manufactured in Japan at the highly regarded Matsumoku factory in 1983. This is an active model with the later P/J pickup configuration.


Specifiations –


Fretless Model


Body Material: Solid Canadian ash


Neck Construction: Through-body heelless neck


Neck Material: Laminate of maple and walnut


Fingerboard: Ebony


Scale Length: 34 inches


Nut Width: 40mmString


Spacing: 19mm at the bridge


Hard Puncher 1 and Super Boomer 1 Pickups


Master volume, active tone, and passive tone controls


Switches: 3-way pickup selector toggle, phase switch, “dual tone” (series/parallel) switch, and an active tone on/off switch


Hardware: Heavy-duty solid brass nut, brass bridge, and brass saddles


Backplates: Anodised aluminium with a brass effect finish


Power Source: 18V active circuit (requires 2 x 9V PP3 batteries)


Serial Number: 3020968

item.title: Peavey Millennium AC BXP - Bass Guitars - Refurbished — $360.13
item.description:
$360.13 · Good · Audio Trader

```html Peavey Millennium AC BXP - Bass Guitars - Refurbished
Peavey Millennium AC BXP - Bass Guitars
This Peavey Millennium AC BXP has been professionally refurbished and is in full working order, having undergone thorough repair work to restore it to complete functionality. It is important to note that this instrument shows significant signs of wear — the surface cosmetics are in poor condition with visible damage, the structural integrity has been compromised, and the overall cleanliness of the piece is poor, reflecting its history as a well-used instrument. Buyers should refer closely to the provided photos to gain a clear understanding of its current physical state before purchasing. The bass has been fully tested following all repair work and performs as intended.

What's Included:
This listing includes the item only. Please see photos for complete details.

About the Peavey:
The Peavey Millennium AC BXP is a well-regarded entry-to-mid-level bass guitar that earned a strong reputation for its solid tone, comfortable playability, and impressive value for money. It is particularly popular among developing bassists and working musicians looking for a reliable, versatile instrument that handles a wide range of musical styles with ease. The Millennium AC BXP's active electronics and quality construction made it a standout in its class, and it continues to be a sought-after model on the used market.

For the player willing to invest in a little cosmetic care, this refurbished Peavey Millennium AC BXP represents a rare opportunity to own a fully functional, sonically capable bass at a fraction of the cost of a new instrument. ```

item.title: Ibanez Roadster II RB888 ‘The Bean Bass’ in Metallic Black Finish — $738.44
item.description:
$738.44 · Fair · CC Music

Pre-owned Ibanez Roadster II RB888 ‘The Bean Bass’ in Metallic Black Finish in used condition.


Various scratches and ‘buckle rash’.


Has a few cracks on the body only which look like the result of a fall. None of these are deep (as shown) and could be described as suface damage. Could be re-finished if necessary. Damage is reflected in price although none of these make any difference to playability, which is great!!


The RB888 also know as “The Bean Bass” is a solid body electric bass model only available in Ibanez for 1984.


Made in Japan by FujiGen.


The RB888 features a double-cutaway alder body with flat top.


Bolt On maple neck with a 21-fret rosewood fingerboard.


White dot position markers, white side dots and matching metallic black headstock.


Super J6 passive pickup.


Accu-cast B II bridge with 19mm string spacing


Plastic nut, Velve Tune BII tuning machines and Ibanez “Dead End” strap buttons.


Has also had the addition of a Hipshot Bass Xtender for Drop ‘D’


August 1983 Production serial number.


Fitted with ‘Luminous’ DR Strings


Fret and Neck condition are very good.

item.title: Astell AK HC5 - Audio Interfaces - Like New w/ Original Box & factory sealed — $473.20
item.description:
$473.20 · Mint · Audio Trader

Astell AK HC5 - Audio Interfaces - Like New w/ Original Box & factory sealed Why This One
  • Like New condition — no marks, wear, or functional issues
  • Fully tested — flawless results across all functional checks
  • Astell&Kern's hallmark portable DAC engineering in a compact, carry-anywhere form.
  • Arrives factory sealed in original box — unopened and untouched.
Condition: Like New

This Astell AK HC5 is a like new-condition audio interface. It has passed our full 8-point functional test with perfect results. Please review all photos carefully, as they provide an accurate representation of the cosmetic condition of the product.

What's Included
  • Astell AK HC5
  • Original Box
  • factory sealed
About This Model

The Astell&Kern AK HC5 is a compact portable DAC/headphone amplifier designed to connect directly to smartphones and computers via USB, bringing improved audio quality to headphones and in-ear monitors on the go. Built around Astell&Kern's focus on high-fidelity portable audio, it targets listeners who want cleaner, more detailed sound from their existing headphones without the bulk of a desktop setup.

A great opportunity to own a Astell AK HC5 at this price point.

item.title: Shergold Marathon Mk1 Vintage 4-String Bass in Black Finish — $1,031.58
item.description:
$1,031.58 · Good · CC Music

Pre-owned Shergold Marathon Mk1 Vintage Bass in Black Finish in used condition with some paint cracking and general wear and dinks as shown.


The Shergold Marathon Bass was a British-built vintage instrument manufactured from 1975 into the early 1980s. Evolving from the Hayman 40/40 bass, it was notably used by professional musicians like Peter Hook of Joy Division/New Order.


All original but missing the bridge cover


Body Material: Obeche


Neck Material: Solid Maple (bolt-on, 4-bolt neck plate).


Fingerboard: Maple featuring black dot inlays.


Scale Length: 34 inches (Standard Long Scale).


Nut Width: 1 7/8 inches (approx. 43mm).


Pickups: 1 x Original Shergold split-coil humbucker (essentially two mini-humbuckers built into a single housing).


Electronics: Mono/Stereo switching capability.


Stereo output with selector switch to route strings 1 & 2 to one channel and strings 3 & 4 to another.


Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Tone.


Hardware: Fully adjustable bridge with barrel saddles, original sealed chrome tuners, and a black plastic bridge cover.


Serial Number : 6128


Missing Bridge cover


No case

item.title: Alembic Japan 1980s AJ-II-JB FL — $1,563.59
item.description:
$1,563.59 · Very Good · TC GAKKI

Welcome to TC Gakki! All photos are of the item for sale. Please note they are for sale in our store and may sell out. Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask any questions!

Product Details
________________________________

A legendary Alembic Japan bass, produced for only a short period in the late 1980s!

Alembic is a brand known as the "pioneer of high-end basses," famously favored by Stanley Clarke.

Alembic Japan, on the other hand, was a unique Japanese-made brand established by the then-domestic importer under license, offering original models distinct from the original.

Manufactured for only a short period in the late 1980s, the production number was extremely small, making it very rare to find one on the used market today.

This particular instrument is a fretless AJ-II-JB with JJ-type pickups.

The body top is made of tiger-stripe maple with a distinct grain, the body back is mahogany, and the fingerboard is ebony.

Equipped with Alembic pickups, it boasts a powerful sound.

Controls include front volume, rear volume, and filter control, making it an active bass.

With its compact body and beautiful violin-like design, this is a truly captivating instrument.

A well-defined sound, typical of a J/J pickup configuration. Combined with powerful output, it delivers a warm yet crisp fretless sound thanks to the mahogany body.
The filter control allows for a warmer, more toned sound.
Recommended for those who want a warm yet crisp fretless bass!

【SPEC】
BODY: Maple Top/Mahogany Back
NECK: Maple
FINGERBOARD: Ebony
P.U: Alembic J/J
CONTROL: 2Vol/Filter
WEIGHT: 3.65kg
SCALE: 34”
NUT WIDTH: 42mm
w/Softcase
*Many scratches
*Neck and electronics have been maintained by our repair technician and are in good condition.
*String height is set to approximately 1.6mm at the 12th fret.
*Parts have been disassembled and cleaned.

[Repair/Modification History/Replacement Parts/External Condition, etc.]
*This information is based on our inspection of used/vintage items.
Please understand in advance.

*Thorough adjustment by our store, with a reliable 5-year adjustment warranty.
*Please feel free to contact our staff for product details.

In charge : Oda
______________________________
Please note that all items are for sale in our Tokyo store.
There is a chance they might be sold out. All items are shipped tracked and insured. All import duties or customs fees are the buyers responsibility - please be aware of the requirements for your country. If you have any questions please ask.

item.title: 【new】Sadowsky / MX20 UV5 SWG/R 4.565kg #A000308-26【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,527
item.description:
$1,527 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sadowsky is a high-end New York brand with top-tier musicians such as Marcus Miller and Will Lee as clients. (Titles omitted)


Previously, the Metroline Express was manufactured in Japan, but as Warwick took over the distribution of Sadowsky products, manufacturing shifted to a factory in China.


While keeping the selling price down, high quality is maintained, making it a very unique product in its price range.


This is the MX20 UV5, the first PB-type guitar in the MX series.


The body is made of lightweight solid Okoume, the neck is made of Roasted Maple, and the fingerboard is made of Morado (Pau Ferro).


This is a standard combination in the MX series.


The construction has been thoroughly considered for excellent body balance and sound projection, resulting in a very refined balance that is comfortable to hold.


The back of the neck has a satin finish, providing a smooth and pleasant feel.


The pickup is a ""Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup.""


It has the powerful, forceful projection characteristic of PB-type basses, yet delivers a clear sound without muddy bass tones.


The preamp features the familiar 2-band EQ.


You can significantly boost the bass and treble frequencies with the touch of a button.


The circuit board of this preamp is almost identical to that of the top-of-the-line models priced around 1 million yen.


Copper foil shielding is also applied, resulting in surprisingly low noise.


These points are extremely significant advantages when choosing an MX series bass.


Even in this price range, Roger Sadowsky's uncompromising commitment to instrument making is evident.


While offering the ultra-smooth playability characteristic of Sadowsky, the sound is unmistakably that of a P-bass.


It outputs a modern tone that beautifully blends a robust punch with sweet, airy, and clear treble tones.


Based on the traditional PB design, this guitar incorporates modern elements, embodying Roger Sadowsky's philosophy.


SPECS


Scale Length: 34"" (864 mm) Long Scale

Body Shape: P-Style body

Body Wood: Okoume, Solidbody

Neck Wood: Roasted Maple (C-Shape, Bolt-On)

Fingerboard Wood: Morado

Inlays: White dot inlays

Fingerboard Radius: 12""

Nut: Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III

Nut Width: 1.875"" (47.5 mm)

Nut String Spacing: Nut string spacing (all strings): 1.54"" / 39.1 mm

Neck width at 12th fret: 2.7"" / 68.6 mm neck width at 12th fret

Neck width at last fret: 3.1"" / 78.7 mm neck width at last fret

Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.86"" / 21.8 mm neck thickness at 1st fret

Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.93"" / 23.6 mm neck thickness at 12th fret

# Frets: 20 Nickel Silver (width: 0.094"" (2.4 mm) / height: 0.051"" (1.3 mm))

Neck Pickup: Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup

Bridge Pickup: None

Preamp: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics (Bass and Treble boost)

Controls: Volume / Treble / Bass

Push/Pull Function: Push/pull function at Bass knob for preamp bypass

Machine Heads: Sadowsky Light Open Gear Machine Heads

Security Locks: Sadowsky S-Security Locks

Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release

Bridge Total String Spacing: 2.83"" / 72mm

Hardware Color: Chrome

Strings: Sadowsky Silver Label, Stainless Steel, 045 - 130

Protector: Sadowsky Fretboard Protector

Tools: Hex key tools

Bag / Case: Sadowsky PortaBag

Made In: China


Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Gig bag, wrench, warranty card


Text: Ryoma Terao


Inspection 담당: Higashie


Product photos: Higashie


Manufacturer's warranty included


◯ About GIB and TONIQ warranties


● Lifetime free maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""string vibration setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.



● Guaranteed Buyback Price


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


● Warranty Against Defects


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.


* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the wording has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)


● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in


When you purchase an item, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


We ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Fender MIJ Traditional '60s Jazz Bass 2025 Collection 2025 - Stardust Pink — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Mint · Fenderfever, inc.

Weight: 7.8 lbs

Condition: Mint, like new in original gig-bag and box.

The Made in Japan Traditional 2025 Collection '60s Jazz Bass® is a special model based on the Made in Japan Traditional Jazz Bass® with a look exclusive to 2025. The "Black Pearl" and "White Pearl" models have a special pearl coating on the body and headstock that is exclusive to these products, and combined with the gold-colored hardware, you can get an even more elegant and refined sense of luxury. The "Competition Black / 3-Color Sunburst" and "Competition 3-Color Sunburst / Aged Natural" are not products with the traditional chromatic competition line, but rather products that allow you to feel a different angle of Fender-ness from the three lines by blending Fender's representative color, 3-Color Sunburst, into the body design. "Stardust Pink" and "Stardust Blue" are characterized by a color that blends "glitter" into the pastel colors that are popular these days, and are finished with Fender's unique burst. This is a new proposal that can only be made by Fender, which has a wide range of colors.

Product specifications include a gloss-finished basswood body. The 9.5-inch radius "U"-shaped maple neck equipped with 20 vintage-style frets provides the classical playability unique to the Traditional series. The 4-saddle vintage-style bridge and original pickups selected for the Traditional series play a realistic and musical vintage tone. This series reflects solid guitar craftsmanship and a flexible response to the needs of players.

This product is a limited production item for 2025.

item.title: Squier Sonic Precision Bass Midnight Blue — $260.12
item.description:
$260.12 · Brand New · Dijkmans Guitars

De instapper die klinkt als een serieuze basgitaar

De Squier Sonic Precision Bass is de ideale eerste basgitaar voor wie niet wil inleveren op toon en speelcomfort. Fender's Squier Sonic-serie is ontworpen om beginners een echte Precision Bass-ervaring te geven, zonder de bijbehorende prijskaartje. In Midnight Blue ziet hij er ook nog eens strak uit.

De Sonic P-Bass klinkt precies zoals je van een Precision Bass verwacht: vol, warm en punchy. De gesplitste single-coil pickup levert een klassiek P-Bass geluid dat thuis is in rock, pop, funk en blues. De lage actie en de comfortabele C-vormige hals maken hem prettig bespeelbaar, ook voor handen die nog wennen aan de basgitaar.

De body is gemaakt van populier, de hals van maple met een laurel fretboard en 20 medium jumbo frets. De vaste brug met gesadelde intonatie zorgt voor een stabiele stemming.

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco Bass Daphne Blue — $260.12
item.description:
$260.12 · Brand New · Dijkmans Guitars

De kortmensuur basgitaar die groot klinkt en klein is van formaat

De Squier Sonic Bronco Bass is de perfecte keuze voor beginners, jongere spelers of bassisten die op zoek zijn naar een compacte basgitaar met een echte Fender-DNA. Met zijn 30" kortmensuur speelt hij soepeler dan een standaard basgitaar, zonder in te leveren op toon of bouwkwaliteit. In Daphne Blue ziet hij er bovendien prachtig uit.

De Bronco Bass klinkt verrassend vol voor zijn formaat. De single-coil pickup levert een heldere, directe toon die goed werkt in pop, rock en indie. De lage actie en de slanke hals maken hem bijzonder toegankelijk voor nieuwe spelers, maar ook voor gevorderden die een lichte, compacte bas zoeken voor op reis of in de studio.

De body is gemaakt van populier, de hals van maple met een laurel fretboard en 20 medium jumbo frets. De vaste brug met gesadelde intonatie zorgt voor een stabiele stemming.

item.title: Fender Traditional II '50s Precision Bass 2025 - White Blonde — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Mint · Fenderfever, inc.

Weight: 7.6 lbs

Condition: Mint, like new in original gig-bag and box.

The Made in Japan Traditional 50s Precision Bass® features a gloss-finished basswood body. The 9.5-inch radius "U"-shaped maple neck with 20 vintage-style frets provides the classical playability unique to the Traditional series. The 4-saddle vintage-style bridge and original pickups selected for the Traditional series produce a realistic and musical vintage tone. The narrow nut width makes it easy to play for Japanese players.

item.title: Duncan 1983 JB-Type — $923.94
item.description:
$923.94 · Very Good · TC GAKKI

Welcome to TC Gakki! All photos are of the item for sale. Please note they are for sale in our store and may sell out. Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask any questions!

Product Details
________________________________

A 1983 Seymour Duncan JB bass crafted by Yubi Onkyo!

Yubi Onkyo Laboratory manufactured and sold Seymour Duncan guitars and basses in the 1980s.

Although Yubi Onkyo disbanded in the 1990s, its high level of craftsmanship remains popular to this day.

This instrument is a JB-type bass from 1983, during the Yubi Onkyo era.

It features an alder body with an ebony fingerboard. The neck is made of high-quality flamed maple. These are luxurious specifications typical of that era.

Thanks to its slightly heavier body, it has a characteristic low-center-of-gravity, tightly packed sound. It has clear bass tones and seems to handle distortion well.

While it produces a straightforward and pleasant sound when plugged directly into an amp, it's also a very easy-to-use, raw sound before going through an effects board, or as a line input to a DI or DAW.

Recommended for anyone looking for a ready-to-use Jazz Bass for home recording or live performances!

[SPEC]
BODY:Alder
NECK: Maple
FINGERBOARD：Ebony
P.U: Seymour Duncan
CONTROL: 2Vol/1Tone
WEIGHT: 4.32kg
SCALE：34”
NUT WIDTH: 39mm
w/Softcase
*Bridge replaced
*Many scratches


*Neck and electronics are in good condition, maintained by our repair technician
*String height is set to approximately 1.6mm at the 12th fret
*Parts have been disassembled and cleaned

[Repair/Modification History/Replacement Parts/External Condition, etc.]
*This information is based on our inspection of used/vintage items.
Please understand in advance.

*Thorough adjustment by our store, with a reliable 5-year adjustment warranty.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop 64 Jazz Bass Journeyman Relic 3 Tone Sunburst Matching Peg Head 2016 ~ Secondhand — $3,767.58
item.description:
$3,767.58 · Very Good · Coda Music

We sold this very sweet Jazz Bass way back in 2016 and it's back and looking for a new home.

Very well looked after and we can't see if it has any extra customer distressing, comes with bridge pickup cover, case, certificate, strap and cloth.

item.title: Fender Telecaster Bass 1974 - Natural — $4,411.10
item.description:
$4,411.10 · Excellent · BassBros

This beautiful 1974 Telecaster bass sounds exactly like it should. Fat, massive tones that will sit under any mix! It's all original except for one thumb rest screw. The pots and pickup date to 1974. It's in excellent condition with light wear to body but really good for its age. Everything works as it should including trussrod, electronics. Included is a non original hard case.

- Part exchange welcome -

Serial Number - 368608
Year - 1974
Colour - Natural
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Maple
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 10lb 14oz / 4.9kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender Bass Humbucker
Gigbag/Hardcase - Hardcase

item.title: Ashdown The Saint PJ Bass - Ice Blue / Roasted Maple — $277.79
item.description:
$277.79 · Good · Richard 's Gear Emporium

Home use only PJ configuration bass.

Fitted with Rotosound tru bass nylon strings.

Small dink to rear of neck just above body,see picture.

item.title: Westone Thunder I-A bass 80s - Wood — $404.82
item.description:
$404.82 · Good · Charlie's Boutique

Vintage 80s Japanese made Westone Thunder I-A bass. Bolt on neck. Very unique active electronics. Split coil pickup. Brass nut and bridge. Very good condition for its age. Not entirely sure what woods the fretboard, neck and body are. The neck was once glossy, but has been sanded to a satin finish. Comes with hard case.

item.title: Fender Bitsa - Fiesta Red Refinish '60's/'70s PJ Bass — $3,671.27
item.description:
$3,671.27 · Excellent · BassBros

Here we have a really cool bitsa bass! This one featuring a 1963 refinished body and tortoiseshell pickguard, 73 neck and hardware. Fitted is a Toltec P Bass pickup with cloth wires and the bridge pickup is a Fender Marcus Miller Jazz Bass neck pickup. The bridge is a Japanese reissue. This bass is in excellent condition with some signs of use throughout. We have checked the trussrod and electronics and everything functions perfectly as it should.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Colour - Fiesta Red Refinish
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood  - Alder
Neck Finish - Satin
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Maple
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 8lb 5oz / 3.8kgs
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Toltec P Bass (neck) and Fender Marcus miller Jazz (bridge)

item.title: Fender USA USED ​​American Professional II Jazz Bass FRETLESS (Olympic White/Rosewood) — $1,694.10
item.description:
$1,694.10 · Very Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

The American Professional II Jazz Bass Fretless, built upon over 60 years of innovation, inspiration, and evolution, meets the demands of today's players.

The popular Slim C-shaped neck features carefully rolled edges and a Super-Natural satin finish, promising a supreme playing experience. A newly designed neck heel provides a comfortable feel and easy access to the upper frets.

The new V-Mod II Jazz Bass Single-Coil pickups deliver more nuanced tones than ever before, while still providing the punch and clarity that are hallmarks of the Jazz Bass.

The American Professional II Jazz Bass Fretless offers a comfortable feel and versatile sound that you'll immediately appreciate the moment you pick it up and hear it. The American Professional II series is packed with extensive improvements that set a new standard for professional instruments.

It is in excellent condition with only minor scratches and no noticeable dents.
The truss rod has plenty of adjustment range, and the neck condition is good with no major issues.

Weight ≈ 4.14 kg
Accessories: Original hard case

item.title: Bacchus USED ​​WL5-ASH/RSM (STN) — $459.19
item.description:
$459.19 · Good · Ikebe Music

Our Business Hours is Mon to Fri / 11:00 to 18:00 JPN time
We will close Sat and Sun, so we will reply to inquiry that received weekend on next week.
Your understanding will be appreciated.

We are receiving the customer order with first comes first serves basis both on website and at real shop.
So occasionally it will be sold out while having email communication.
Please understand in advance.

Japanese consumption tax is not required for international shopping. However you may be required to pay duty, tax and import fee when receiving your items in your country. You must pay all these duty, tax and fee as receiver/importer and we do not cover any of them.

■Please note
The product description is an automatic translation of the Japanese description. Please contact us if you have any questions.

-----------------------------------

Please be noted this one is USED not new.
There is not any issue on the function and the playing condition but blemishes on the cosmetic.
Please send message for more detail information of the condition.

-----------------------------------

Bacchus Global series "Roasted Maple Neck" model!
Roasted maple is a type of maple wood that has been heat-treated at high temperatures to evaporate moisture and oils, thereby increasing its rigidity. When used in a neck, this effect extends not only to stability but also to the sound, producing a rich, resonant tone and a mellow, vintage-like tone that has aged over time.

This guitar features an ash body with a see-through finish that highlights the wood grain, allowing for a wide range of tones that cover many genres. Like the higher-end models, it is equipped with a turbo switch, which allows you to connect the two single-coil pickups in series. This produces a pseudo-humbucking sound. In this mode, the Front Vol knob is active, and the Rear Vol knob is bypassed.

This electric bass features a dinky shape inspired by traditional JB style, combined with the crisp, refreshing sound of roasted maple, making it a high-performance model at a great price!

There are some minor scratches and dents, but it is in good working order and can be used without any problems.
The truss rod has plenty of adjustment range, and the neck is in good condition.

Weight ≈ 4.70 kg
Accessories: Original soft case

item.title: Epiphone Jack Casady Signature 2025 - Pelham Blue — $732.86
item.description:
$732.86 · Excellent · BassBros

The Epiphone Jack Casady Signature Bass is universally recognized as one of the great electric bass designs and it's been embraced by bassists in every genre.

The Epiphone Jack Casady Signature Bass was designed by Casady in collaboration with Epiphone and is the culmination of years of experimentation by the legendary Jefferson Airplane and Hot Tuna bassist to create an instrument with superb, balanced electric tone and the response of an upright acoustic bass.

Jack Casady is a member of the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame for his pioneering work with Jefferson Airplane and Hot Tuna and was presented with a Lifetime Achievement Award by Bass Player magazine in 2011. He's one of the rare rock bassists known by fans, players, and even non-musicians for his signature tone.

This bass is in excellent condition throughout, it has just had the pickguard removed and the knobs replaced.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - 25041512419
Colour - Pelham Blue
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood  - Walnut
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Mahogany
Fretboard - Indian Laurel
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 8lb 7oz / 3.8kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - JCB-1 Humbucker
Gigbag/Hardcase - N/A

item.title: Sandberg Ken Taylor Basic 4 - Blackburst Stain — $1,465.71
item.description:
$1,465.71 · Very Good · BassBros

What an amazing, versatile bass. Since joining the Peter Maffay Band in 1993, Ken Taylor has been playing basses from the cult company Sandberg in Braunschweig, Germany. His signature bass, the Sandberg Basic Ken Taylor, is a workhorse reduced to the essentials, a 4-string instrument featuring classic tone woods, 2x power humbuckers and active electronics, offering versatile sounds and excellent playability offers. The equipped humbucker pickups really gives you so much punch! This bass is in good overall condition, with some scratches to the finish throughout and an large area of wear through the finish on the back of the body. Included is a Hiscox hardcase.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - 2501
Colour - Blackburst Stain
Body Finish - Satin
Body Wood - Ash
Neck Finish - Satin
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 24
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lb 3oz / 4.1kg
Electronics - Active 2 Band
Pickups - Sandberg Humbuckers
Gigbag/Hardcase - Hiscox Hardcase

item.title: TARIO Fretless 5 String Electric Acoustic Bass spruce top Mahogany back & sides (Fretless) — $249.99
item.description:
$249.99 · Brand New · mangolulu

Fretless 5 string electric acoustic bass is designed & made in China by a professional instruments manufacturer, * laminated spruce black matte top, laminated mahogany back & sides, composite rosewood fingerboard & bridge saddle * chrome hardware,diecast machine tuners, a truss rod , * 22 fret , with side dots, 4 band EQ, a 9V battery installed * the overall length: 48", the scale length: 34" , fingerboard 's overall length: 25" * the overall length of the body : 20", the depth of the upper body: 3 3/4", the depth of the lower body: 4 1/2" * the largest width of the upper bout : 11 3/16", the largest width of the lower bout: 16 1/4" , the width of the waist:9 5/8"

item.title: Fender Japan JB-75 Jazz Bass Reissue MIJ 1998 - Three Tone Sunburst — $1,254.93
item.description:
$1,254.93 · Good · BassBros

These are superb basses! This being a fantastic '70s reissue Jazz Bass with added build quality from the Japanese! This one finished in sunburst with an awesome wood grain, and check out that super dark rosewood board. This would make a great gigging bass and attention detail is second to none as you would expect from a Japanese made bass. The body stamped is JB-72R and neck stamped JB-75. It is in good condition for its age, with lots of marks and scratches to body throughout and some dings all over, including a large ding to side of body by forearm cut. We have fully checked over the bass and everything is working perfectly as it should.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - A027972 MIJ
Year - 1998
Colour - Three Tone Sunburst
Body Wood - Ash
Body Finish - Gloss
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lb 7oz / 4.3kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender J
Gigbag/Hardcase - N/A

item.title: 【used】Bacchus / WL5-ASH/RSM STN 4.670kg #GI14935【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $893
item.description:
$893 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Bacchus is a Japanese brand based in Nagano.


It's a brand under the Deviser umbrella, which owns a large guitar factory called the Asuka Factory. The high quality, stemming from the factory's in-house production, is highly regarded by many musicians.


This model is the WL model, part of the WOODLINE series, Bacchus's top-of-the-line lineage.


The body is made of ash, and the neck and fretboard are made of roasted maple.


The most distinctive feature is the use of roasted maple for the neck and fretboard.


This is also known as thermowood.


Thermowood, which was commercialized in the musical instrument field by Sago of Japan, was originally used in Finland as a building material for saunas.


Thermowood is valued for its resistance to high temperatures and humidity, and its usefulness in musical instruments is evident from its adoption by top manufacturers such as Sadowsky and Suhr.


It is equipped with original single-coil pickups.


It features the brand's characteristic smooth playability, and the sound is well-balanced and smooth from low to high frequencies. It delivers a powerful sound while maintaining excellent response.


It's a pleasure to play, and you'll want to play this instrument for hours.


This is a guitar that fully showcases the potential of Roasted Maple; please give it a try.


The frets have approximately 80% remaining.


The truss rod is in good condition.


The neck is in good condition.


The body and paintwork show minor scratches on the body top and pickguard. There is a small paint chip of about 0.7mm near the neck pocket.


The electronics are in good condition.


No obvious modifications were found.


Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, master tone (Pull up: Turbo SW)

Nut width: 45.0mm

String spacing at bridge: 18.0mm

Scale length: 34 inches

Year of manufacture: Unknown

Country of manufacture: INDONESIA


During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.


These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.


These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.


Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.


They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Soft case


Text: Mizune Ishikawa


Inspection 담당: Oshima


Product Photos: Tei


GIB 3-Month Warranty Included


◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information


●Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""String Vibration Setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.


●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


●Defect Warranty


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.


* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)


● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in


When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


We will ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Fender Japan Junior Collection Jazz Bass 30" Scale 2024 - Daphne Blue — $1,254.93
item.description:
$1,254.93 · Excellent · BassBros

Here we have a Junior Collection Jazz Bass, a cracking 30 inch scale instrument. It's very lightweight at 7lb 5oz / 3.3kg. The attention detail is second to none as you would expect from a Japanese made bass. It is in near mint condition with minimal signs of use. We have fully checked over the bass, everything is working perfectly as it should. Included is a gigbag.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - JD24030376
Year - 2024
Colour - Daphne Blue
Body Wood - Maple
Body Finish - Satin
Neck Finish - Satin
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 19
Scale Length - 30"
Weight - 7lb 5oz / 3.3kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender Junior Collection Modified Single Coil Jazz Bass®
Gigbag/Hardcase - Gigbag

item.title: Fender Japan Custom Order PB-57 Precision Bass Reissue MIJ 1992 - Indigo Purple Metallic — $1,284.25
item.description:
$1,284.25 · Good · BassBros

Here is a fantastic 1992 Japanese made Fender PB-57 '50s Reissue Precision Bass. This one is a custom order indigo purple metallic. It's in good overall condition with some chips and dings throughout, along with a large area of missing finish on bottom side of lower horn as can be seen on the photos. We have checked the bass over fully and the trussrod, electronics all work as they should. A gigbag is included.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - L026528
Year - 1992
Colour - Indigo Purple Metallic
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Alder
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Maple
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lb 1oz / 4.1kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender P
Gigbag/Hardcase - Gigbag

item.title: Huttl Beat Bass 1950's Sunburst (Vintage German acoustic-electric bass guitar) — $893.17
item.description:
$893.17 · Excellent · Reforged

Information about the guitar:
I offer this amazing Beatles style Huttl model Beat Bass. Huttl guitars are rare in general, but Huttl in excellent condition is simply super rare to find :)

This is sister guitar to model Beat a GoGo which I also have for sale.


Condition:

  • Head – excellent condition.
  • Keys – excellent condition.
  • Nut – excellent condition.
  • Neck – excellent condition.
  • Fretboard – excellent condition.
  • Frets – excellent condition.
  • Body – excellent condition.
  • Lacquer – very good condition with small scratches and bumps here and there (visible on photos).
  • Electronics – excellent condition. The old 3 PIN was changed to normal jack.
  • Equipment – excellent condition. 

Please note this is true vintage instrument - if you want to play it, it may need some setup.
